arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie confesses Aberdeen's resurgence has got him dreaming of a Scotland recall like teammates
arts.sum: Kevin Nisbet, Nicky Devlin and Jack MacKenzie are all in Steve Clarke's squad

arts.ttl: Kenny McLean in Luka Modric admission as he insists Scotland players are full of belief for Croatia challenge
arts.sum: Things don't get any easier for Steve Clarke's players after a gruelling run of results but McLean insists the belief has never wavered.

arts.ttl: Steve Clarke hands Hearts duo Scotland training stint to help Nations League preparations
arts.sum: The teenagers helped fine tune preparations ahead of Saturday's clash with Croatia
